title: Fidacy A2A Task.metadata Block
description: The object an A2A client copies into a Task's `metadata` field. Models `{ fidacy_assessment: <outcome> }`. The outcome is an opaque object carrying the assessment result; clients MUST copy it into `Task.metadata` and MUST NOT invent new Task fields. The recommended Task state is derived from the decision (see a2a-metadata.md).

fidacy_assessment.description: The Fidacy assessment outcome, carried verbatim. Treated as opaque metadata by the A2A layer; the signed verdict (vc_jws) inside it is the authoritative, verifiable result.
